serverInfo.name: resume-parser
serverInfo.title: AI Resume Parser & ATS Toolkit
serverInfo.description: AI-powered resume parsing and applicant tracking system (ATS) management. Parse resumes from PDF/DOCX/TXT/URL, extract skills and experience, assess candidates against criteria, manage ATS pipeline with jobs/candidates/offers/interviews, and run batch operations.

openaiApiKey.title: OpenAI API Key
openaiApiKey.description: Optional OpenAI API key for AI-powered candidate assessment and structured extraction. If omitted, tools fall back to algorithmic analysis (NLP/NER/TF-IDF) — no AI calls required.

aiProvider.title: AI Provider
aiProvider.description: AI provider to use when apiKey is supplied (openai, anthropic, google, deepseek, glm, qwen, openrouter, opencodezen). Defaults to openai.

aiModel.title: AI Model
aiModel.description: Specific AI model name (e.g. gpt-4o-mini, gpt-4o, claude-3-5-haiku-20241022). Defaults to gpt-4o-mini when using OpenAI.
